{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>
<HEAD>6. Bey Herrn Haag an der Augustinergasse sind zu verkauffen:</HEAD>
<BIBL><TITLE>Prideaun A. und N. Testam</TITLE>, in einer Connex. mit der Völcker-Historie, <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE> <YEAR>1725</YEAR>. <VOLUME>4. 1I. Tom. 1. Vol. 2</VOLUME> <PRICE>Cattenburg</PRICE></BIBL>
<BIBL><TITLE>Sapientia Mos. de Vita & Scriptis Mosis contra Deistas</TITLE>. <PLACE>Amst.</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>4.</FORMAT></BIBL>
<BIBL><TITLE>Bibl.</TITLE> <VOLUME>8r. 70.</VOLUME> <AUTHOR>Interpp. Reineccii</AUTHOR>, <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT></BIBL>
<BIBL><TITLE>Bibl. Hebr.</TITLE> von <AUTHOR>punctata Leusdenii</AUTHOR>, <PLACE>Frf.</PLACE> <YEAR>1694</YEAR>. <FORMAT>12.</FORMAT></BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>Seldenus</AUTHOR> <TITLE>de Diis Syris</TITLE>. <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1692</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT></BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>Gottschedens</AUTHOR> <TITLE>critische Dichtkunst</TITLE>, <PLACE>Leipzig</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT></BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>Büdickers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Grundsätze der Deutschen Sprach</TITLE>, <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE>, <YEAR>1729</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT></BIBL>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":12,"explanation":"Corrected character encoding errors (mojibake) to restore German umlauts and standard abbreviations (e.g., Augustinergasse, Völcker, 8vo, Grundsätze, Büdickers). Fixed XML structure by flattening incorrectly nested BIBL tags into siblings. Added HEAD tag for introductory text. Corrected PRIZE tag to PRICE. Escaped ampersand character."}

parsed.explanation: Corrected character encoding errors (mojibake) to restore German umlauts and standard abbreviations (e.g., Augustinergasse, Völcker, 8vo, Grundsätze, Büdickers). Fixed XML structure by flattening incorrectly nested BIBL tags into siblings. Added HEAD tag for introductory text. Corrected PRIZE tag to PRICE. Escaped ampersand character.
